name: 多边形与四边形
subject: math
curriculum_points: 探索并证明平行四边形的性质定理：平行四边形的对边相等、对角相等、对角线互相平分。
探索并证明平行四边形的判定定理：一组对边平行且相等的四边形是平行四边形；两组对边分别相等的四边形是平行四边形；对角线互相平分的四边形是平行四边形。
理解平行四边形、矩形、菱形、正方形、梯形的概念，以及它们之间的关系；了解四边形的不稳定性。

textbook_content.curriculum_standard: 义务教育课程标准（2022年版）
textbook_content.subject: math

deep_snippets.text:
Count the money (bills and change) in your pocket or purse. Your instructor will record the amounts. As a class, construct a histogram displaying the data. Discuss how many intervals you think would be appropriate. You may want to experiment with the number of intervals. Frequency Polygons Frequency polygons are analogous to line graphs, and just as line graphs make continuous data visually easy to interpret, so too do frequency polygons. To construct a frequency polygon, first examine the data and decide on the number of intervals and resulting interval size, for both the x-axis and y-axis. The x-axis will show the lower and upper bound for each interval, containing the data values, whereas the y-axis will represent the frequencies of the values. Each data point represents the frequency for each interval. For example, if an interval has three data values in it, the frequency polygon will show a 3 at the upper endpoint of that interval. After choosing the appropriate intervals, begin plotting the data points. After all the points are plotted, draw line segments to connect them. Example 2.12 A frequency polygon was constructed from the frequency table below. Frequency Distribution for Calculus Final Test Scores Lower Bound Upper Bound Frequency Cumulative Frequency 49.5 59.5
Chapter 2 | Descriptive Statistics This OpenStax book is available for free at http://cnx.org/content/col30309/1.8

Figure 2.8 Notice that each point represents frequency for a particular interval. These points are located halfway between the lower bound and upper bound. In fact, the horizontal axis, or x-axis, shows only these midpoint values. For the interval 49.5–59.5 the value 54.5 is represented by a point, showing the correct frequency of 5. For the interval occurring before 49.5–59.5, (as well as 39.5–49.5), the value of the midpoint, or 44.5, is represented by a point, showing a frequency of 0, since we do not have any values in that range. The same idea applies to the last interval of 99.5–109.5, which has a midpoint of 104.5 and correctly shows a point representing a frequency of 0. Looking at the graph, we say that this distribution is skewed because one side of the graph does not mirror the other side. 2.12 Construct a frequency polygon of U.S. presidents’ ages at inauguration shown in Table 2.18. Age at Inauguration Frequency 41.5–46.5
Table 2.18 Frequency polygons are useful for comparing distributions. This comparison is achieved by overlaying the frequency polygons drawn for different data sets. Chapter 2 | Descriptive Statistics

deep_worked_example.stem: 根据教材片段，构造一道关于「多边形与四边形」的建模或计算题，并说明解题步骤。
deep_worked_example.solution_outline: 先识别变量和数量关系，再建立表达式、图形或方程，最后解释结果在情境中的含义。

errors.description: 只记「多边形与四边形」的公式或结论，不理解适用条件和变量含义。
解题时跳步，未把已知条件、关系式和结论之间的推理写完整。

exercises.stem: 根据教材片段，构造一道关于「多边形与四边形」的建模或计算题，并说明解题步骤。
exercises.answer: 先识别变量和数量关系，再建立表达式、图形或方程，最后解释结果在情境中的含义。

exercises.stem: 根据课标要点，说明「多边形与四边形」中最关键的数量关系或图形关系是什么。
exercises.answer: 应围绕：探索并证明平行四边形的性质定理：平行四边形的对边相等、对角相等、对角线互相平分。，说明概念、条件和表示方法。

exercises.stem: 设计一个生活情境，用「多边形与四边形」建立模型并解释结果。
exercises.answer: 需写出已知量、未知量、关系式或图形表示，并解释结论含义。

real_world: 在购物、行程、测量或数据分析中寻找与「多边形与四边形」相关的数量关系。
